title: La différence, c'est que c'est pas pareil
original_title: La différence, c'est que c'est pas pareil
overview: After several years in the United States, Sylvain heads back to France to attend his grandson’s christening. He wastes no time trying to catch up with his ex-wife and their children, but not everyone is pleased by his unexpected return...
